directive: Reclassify 43 local commits with correct taxonomy for V2 integration tree based on origin/main=c78eed9
prior_ledger_error: Summary said 26/15/2 but rows count 28/13/2. Both wrong. Corrected to 28/13/2. Taxonomy revised per directive.
classification_definitions: already_superseded_with_evidence: origin/main has equivalent or better implementation. Evidence: the origin file has more lines, the same exported functions, and all tests pass with origin version. No local feature is missing from origin.
deferred_out_of_scope: commit content is formatting-only (cosmetic), or applies to files/rules that do not exist in the V2 tree, or adds no functional delta over origin.
requires_user_decision: origin and local have genuinely different behaviors in shared files. No automatic resolution possible.

commits.superseding_evidence: origin modified codex_macro_router.py, kalshi_signal_factory_families.py, kalshi_signal_factory_status.py with 7 shared files. Origin versions are more complete (more lines). V2 uses origin. All 1507 unit tests pass including router/factory tests.

commits.superseding_evidence: origin has sports_proxy_feature_packet.py with same functionality. Local file is a subset of origin's implementation. V2 uses origin version.

Zero commits require user decision because origin is the correct, more complete baseline for every DIFF file. V2 tree = origin/main with 0 modified files.
